nasb.text: So, being sent out by the Holy Spirit, they went down to Seleucia and from there they sailed to Cyprus.

esv.text: So, being sent out by the Holy Spirit, they went down to Seleucia, and from there they sailed to Cyprus.

cnv.text: 他們既然奉聖靈差遣，就下到西流基，從那裡坐船往塞浦路斯。

ccb.text: 二人受圣灵差遣，下到西流基，从那里乘船去塞浦路斯。

csbs.text: 这样，他们两个人受圣灵的差遣，就下到塞琉西亚，又从那里坐船前往塞浦路斯岛，
